---
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="career-site">

  <section class="career-hero">

    <div class="career-status reveal">
      <span>SOHA ARIAN / PROFESSIONAL PORTFOLIO</span>
      <span class="system-active">CAREER PROFILE ACTIVE</span>
      <span>DALLAS, TEXAS</span>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-centered">

      <div class="hero-label reveal">
        CLAIMS · CYBER RISK · TECHNOLOGY LAW
      </div>

      <h1 class="career-name reveal">
        SOHA<br>
        <span>ARIAN</span>
      </h1>

      <h2 class="career-target reveal">
        Building toward a career in cyber litigation claims.
      </h2>

      <p class="career-summary reveal">
        I am a claims professional with a foundation in quantitative
        risk management, cybersecurity policy, insurance operations,
        underwriting, and legal-document analysis. My goal is to
        specialize in complex cyber claims involving coverage,
        liability, damages, regulatory obligations, and litigation.
      </p>

      <div class="career-actions reveal">

        <a class="career-button" href="cv.html">
          View Résumé
        </a>

        <a class="career-button secondary" href="#professional-story">
          Review Professional Story
        </a>

      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="hero-progress reveal">
      SCROLL TO REVIEW PROFILE
    </div>

  </section>


  <section class="story-panel" id="professional-story">

    <div class="story-inner">

      <div class="story-number reveal">
        01 / CURRENT EXPERIENCE
      </div>

      <div class="story-content">

        <div class="story-heading-block reveal">

          <div class="story-label">
            ZURICH NORTH AMERICA
          </div>

          <h2>
            Developing the foundation required for complex claims.
          </h2>

        </div>

        <div class="featured-record reveal">

          <div class="record-header">

            <span>
              CLAIMS HANDLING TRAINEE
            </span>

            <span>
              JUNE 2026–PRESENT
            </span>

          </div>

          <p>
            Developing experience in claim handling, policy review,
            liability evaluation, documentation standards, reserve
            considerations, regulated insurance operations, and
            legal-escalation indicators.
          </p>

          <div class="evidence-row">

            <span>POLICY REVIEW</span>
            <span>LIABILITY ANALYSIS</span>
            <span>CLAIM DOCUMENTATION</span>
            <span>LEGAL ESCALATION</span>

          </div>

        </div>

        <a class="section-link reveal" href="cv.html">
          Review Complete Experience →
        </a>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>


  <section class="story-panel">

    <div class="story-inner">

      <div class="story-number reveal">
        02 / PROFESSIONAL FOUNDATION
      </div>

      <div class="story-content">

        <div class="story-heading-block reveal">

          <div class="story-label">
            EXPERIENCE ACROSS THE CLAIM LIFECYCLE
          </div>

          <h2>
            Claims, underwriting, contracts, and legal records.
          </h2>

        </div>

        <div class="experience-sequence">

          <article class="sequence-record reveal">

            <div class="sequence-code">
              EXP / 01
            </div>

            <div class="sequence-main">

              <h3>
                Business Lines Underwriting
              </h3>

              <div class="sequence-company">
                LIBERTY MUTUAL INSURANCE
              </div>

              <p>
                Reviewed certificates of insurance, renewal
                documentation, and digital policy records while
                identifying documentation issues affecting commercial
                risk exposure.
              </p>

            </div>

          </article>

          <article class="sequence-record reveal">

            <div class="sequence-code">
              EXP / 02
            </div>

            <div class="sequence-main">

              <h3>
                Legal Document Review
              </h3>

              <div class="sequence-company">
                OPENING DOORS INTERNATIONAL SERVICES
              </div>

              <p>
                Organized confidential legal records, reviewed
                immigration documentation, and communicated with
                Afghan clients as a native Farsi speaker.
              </p>

            </div>

          </article>

          <article class="sequence-record reveal">

            <div class="sequence-code">
              EXP / 03
            </div>

            <div class="sequence-main">

              <h3>
                Contract and Investment Records
              </h3>

              <div class="sequence-company">
                LIONCHASE NORTH AMERICA
              </div>

              <p>
                Organized investment agreements, renewal timelines,
                and deal documentation while collaborating with legal
                teams on contract-related issues.
              </p>

            </div>

          </article>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>


  <section class="story-panel">

    <div class="story-inner">

      <div class="story-number reveal">
        03 / EDUCATION
      </div>

      <div class="story-content">

        <div class="story-heading-block reveal">

          <div class="story-label">
            INSURANCE RISK + CYBERSECURITY POLICY
          </div>

          <h2>
            An interdisciplinary foundation for cyber claims.
          </h2>

        </div>

        <div class="education-stack">

          <article class="education-record reveal">

            <div class="education-topline">

              <span>
                MASTER OF SCIENCE
              </span>

              <span>
                GPA 3.8
              </span>

            </div>

            <h3>
              Cybersecurity, Technology, and Policy
            </h3>

            <p class="institution">
              The University of Texas at Dallas · Expected May 2027
            </p>

            <p>
              Coursework in cybersecurity policy, analytics,
              governance, auditing, data visualization, conflict in
              cyberspace, knowledge mining, and applied security.
            </p>

          </article>

          <article class="education-record reveal">

            <div class="education-topline">

              <span>
                BACHELOR OF SCIENCE
              </span>

              <span>
                GPA 3.5
              </span>

            </div>

            <h3>
              Quantitative Finance
            </h3>

            <p class="institution">
              The University of Texas at Dallas · December 2025
            </p>

            <p>
              Concentration in Risk Management and Cybersecurity, with
              coursework in liability insurance, enterprise risk,
              operational risk, commercial property, cybersecurity
              risk, and insurance systems.
            </p>

          </article>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>


  <section class="story-panel">

    <div class="story-inner">

      <div class="story-number reveal">
        04 / RESEARCH
      </div>

      <div class="story-content">

        <div class="story-heading-block reveal">

          <div class="story-label">
            INSURANCE RESEARCH WITH PRACTICAL APPLICATION
          </div>

          <h2>
            Research connecting cyber risk, claims, and legal escalation.
          </h2>

        </div>

        <div class="research-showcase">

          <article class="research-feature reveal">

            <div class="research-code">
              RESEARCH / 01
            </div>

            <h3>
              Healthcare Provider Cyber Insurance and NIST Guidelines
            </h3>

            <p>
              Examined how standardized underwriting questionnaires
              and NIST-aligned cybersecurity controls could improve
              healthcare cyber-insurance underwriting, governance,
              regulatory alignment, and organizational accountability.
            </p>

            <a href="research.html">
              Inspect Research →
            </a>

          </article>

          <article class="research-feature reveal">

            <div class="research-code">
              RESEARCH / 02
            </div>

            <h3>
              Workers’ Compensation Claims Analytics
            </h3>

            <p>
              Developed a framework for analyzing medical inflation,
              billing behavior, claim outcomes, reserves, and possible
              litigation-referral indicators.
            </p>

            <a href="research.html">
              Inspect Research →
            </a>

          </article>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>


  <section class="story-panel">

    <div class="story-inner">

      <div class="story-number reveal">
        05 / LEADERSHIP AND RECOGNITION
      </div>

      <div class="story-content">

        <div class="story-heading-block reveal">

          <div class="story-label">
            INSURANCE INDUSTRY ENGAGEMENT
          </div>

          <h2>
            Leadership supported by professional recognition.
          </h2>

        </div>

        <div class="recognition-layout">

          <article class="recognition-primary reveal">

            <div class="research-code">
              LEADERSHIP / 01
            </div>

            <h3>
              President, Gamma Iota Sigma
            </h3>

            <p>
              Led efforts connecting students with professionals in
              insurance, claims, underwriting, and risk management.
              Represented UT Dallas at RiskWorld and the Houston Marine
              and Energy Conference and organized an RMI career fair.
            </p>

          </article>

          <div class="award-list">

            <div class="award-record reveal">
              <span>01</span>
              <p>
                NextGen Scholarship — one of 25 recipients nationwide
              </p>
            </div>

            <div class="award-record reveal">
              <span>02</span>
              <p>
                ICT Education Foundation Scholarships — 2024 and 2025
              </p>
            </div>

            <div class="award-record reveal">
              <span>03</span>
              <p>
                YRP Dallas, IIAD, Dallas CPCU, and DFW RIMS Scholarships
              </p>
            </div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>


  <section class="story-panel career-goal-panel">

    <div class="story-inner">

      <div class="story-number reveal">
        06 / CAREER DIRECTION
      </div>

      <div class="story-content">

        <div class="goal-statement reveal">

          <div class="story-label">
            TARGET PROFESSIONAL PATH
          </div>

          <h2>
            Cyber Litigation Claims Specialist
          </h2>

          <p>
            My objective is to handle complex cyber claims involving
            coverage interpretation, liability, regulatory duties,
            technical evidence, damages, negotiation, and litigation
            strategy.
          </p>

        </div>

        <div class="goal-path">

          <div class="goal-step reveal">

            <span>
              01
            </span>

            <div>
              <h3>Claims Experience</h3>
              <p>
                Build strong claim-handling, liability, coverage, and
                documentation judgment.
              </p>
            </div>

          </div>

          <div class="goal-step reveal">

            <span>
              02
            </span>

            <div>
              <h3>Technology and Law</h3>
              <p>
                Pursue graduate legal study focused on technology,
                cybersecurity, regulation, and legal reasoning.
              </p>
            </div>

          </div>

          <div class="goal-step reveal">

            <span>
              03
            </span>

            <div>
              <h3>Cyber Litigation Claims</h3>
              <p>
                Apply insurance, technical, analytical, and legal
                knowledge to complex cyber disputes.
              </p>
            </div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>


  <section class="career-footer">

    <div class="footer-message reveal">

      <div class="story-label">
        COMPLETE PROFESSIONAL RECORD
      </div>

      <h2>
        Claims experience. Cybersecurity knowledge. Legal direction.
      </h2>

      <div class="career-actions">

        <a class="career-button" href="cv.html">
          View Résumé
        </a>

        <a class="career-button secondary" href="research.html">
          Review Research
        </a>

        <a class="career-button secondary" href="project.html">
          Review Projects
        </a>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>

</div>
```
